title: clinopodium brevicalyx
intro: Clinopodium brevicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, and is used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Clinopodium brevicalyx include its ability to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil is extracted through steam distillation for use in aromatherapy and topical applications.
